name: Editorial
description: Digital print magazine aesthetic. High-contrast, dramatic typography, zero decoration. Content is the design. Ink-on-paper warmth with modern sensibility.
personality: sharp + flat elevation + instant motion + no borders + no gradients

decorators.editorial-card: Clean white card with thin hairline border, generous whitespace, and elegant serif typography framing.
decorators.editorial-pullquote: Large italic serif text with bold left accent border in secondary red, generous vertical margins.
decorators.editorial-divider: Thin single-pixel line separator with generous vertical spacing to create breathing room between sections.
decorators.editorial-caption: Small uppercase tracking-wide text in muted color for image captions and metadata labels.
decorators.editorial-dropcap: Oversized initial letter spanning three lines in bold serif weight to open article sections.

editorial-card.description: Clean white card with thin hairline border, generous whitespace, and elegant serif typography framing.
editorial-card.intent: Use for article cards and content containers. Minimal styling lets typography and imagery do all the visual work.

editorial-pullquote.description: Large italic serif text with bold left accent border in secondary red, generous vertical margins.
editorial-pullquote.intent: Use to highlight key quotes and important passages. The left border in red creates dramatic emphasis within long-form content.

editorial-divider.description: Thin single-pixel line separator with generous vertical spacing to create breathing room between sections.
editorial-divider.intent: Use between major content sections. Generous vertical spacing creates the dramatic pacing of a print magazine layout.

editorial-caption.description: Small uppercase tracking-wide text in muted color for image captions and metadata labels.
editorial-caption.intent: Use for image captions, bylines, dates, and metadata labels. Uppercase tracking creates the classic editorial meta-text treatment.

editorial-dropcap.description: Oversized initial letter spanning three lines in bold serif weight to open article sections.
editorial-dropcap.intent: Use at the start of article sections for dramatic editorial opening. The oversized letter signals a new section or chapter.
